own_review_points: Final diff already uses the descriptive method names getOutShouldOnlyReturnOutputCapturedFromSystemOut / getErrShouldOnlyReturnOutputCapturedFromSystemErr (human-ref naming points already addressed)
getOut/getErr tests correctly emit BOTH System.out and System.err and assert exclusion — addresses human-ref correctness points
getAll test emits both out and err and asserts both — NOT equivalent to the existing toString test which only emits/asserts System.out
No substantive issues remain in this small test-only addition
notes: Tiny test-only PR; in the FINAL diff every human-reference concern (naming, dual-stream output) is already satisfied, so those are not valid misses. v8 point 1 claims getAllShouldReturnAllCapturedOutput is 'functionally equivalent' to toStringShouldReturnAllCapturedOutput — refutable: the existing toString test only emits/asserts System.out while getAll emits and asserts both out+err, so it is NOT equivalent (wrong, -1); it also cites OutputCapture.java:98-100 which is outside the single changed file (fab). Points 2 and 3 are praise/restatement citing OutputCapture/PrintStreamCapture internals outside the diff (trivial). net=-1.
